strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated builder mindset with open-source platforms, founding GISCollective, and recent MCP/agentic tooling work
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, public talks) showing ability to inspire and teach others
concerns: Title is Senior/Staff Software Developer, not Principal/Director-level IC with strategic advisory scope
Limited evidence of deep AI/ML expertise — only brief mention of MCP and agent tooling, no shipped AI products or platforms
No advanced degree in AI and no demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product direction at scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Broad engineering experience and entrepreneurial open-source track record

response.justification: The candidate has the raw years and a credible polyglot, builder-oriented background with founder and open-source credentials, but the resume does not show the recognized AI expertise, shipped AI platforms, or strategic advisory experience expected of a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy. Recent MCP/agent work is promising but too thin to anchor a Director-level IC role centered on cloud and AI differentiation.
